name: Steve Chabot
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
In this week's blog I keep politics brief... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Merry Christmas!](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-j/)
In this week's blog I keep politics brief with a short update and share a Christmas greeting. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Impeachment - Here We Go](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-d/)
Today's the day. Democrats in the House are actually going to go through with it. They are going to impeach President Trump - on the flimsiest of grounds! In this week's blog, I give you my thoughts on how this all plays out. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Impeaching the President - They're Really Going to Do It](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-u/)
Democrats in Congress have been calling for President Trump's impeachment since the day he was inaugurated. In the next few days, the Democrat-led House will presumably vote for impeachment. In this week's blog, I discuss the upcoming impeachment vote in the House, how the Senate will likely vote, and how this whole process is doing irreparable harm to our nation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The Impeachment Sham is now Back in the Judiciary Committee](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-n/)
Today the impeachment circus returns to the Judiciary Committee, on which I've served for more than two decades. In this week's blog, I discuss the latest act in the democrats' impeachment circus and how I will use my time in the committee to expose how this inquiry is dividing our country and wasting millions in taxpayer dollars. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhltuun-kujkulhluu-f/)

name: Lisa Scheller
subject: Merry Christmas!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LISA SCHELLER FOR CONGRESS [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
As the radical left continues its crusade against our conservative values, absolutely nothing is safe. Not even Christmas. Peter, As the radical left continues its crusade against our conservative values, absolutely nothing is safe.
Not even Christmas.
Today, as families all across Pennsylvania prepare to celebrate Christmas with friends and family, leftists are trying to remove every mention of religion from the holidays.
Public universities are BANNING Christmas parties, decorations are being removed from public spaces... the list goes on and on.
Celebrations like Christmas should be safe from the politically correct liberal agenda, and in Congress, I’ll fight to promote the conservative values that would never shy away from wishing everyone in America a Merry Christmas.
**If you agree, please add your name to my petition and join me in saying Merry Christmas to all!** [ **SAY MERRY CHRISTMAS** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=4cdf95b5e6d04322b48ce64aa5fbb649&_e=9XCbm1UT7UxnFqvvy6OXr7EJMurud0-1O2yPhhAWK_9p9o4STUiT2hgNyjyVPxxdqf9JDqOCgv5mj1SgaHWa1YHQIg6ssaqTxL4icrNDhU8sSp5mvL2DrMVgIDKWD56lTe3hVb6fYCTxq42v4mGWjLRMGG62JYK00qE-4FRBydp7ojeLsrIPEs50UrJAioj-fuEMHg6yZt0KbBaRS_fqgAqw8P1iBAaLuFfyQ_r9FUgv_DXfRoRGZE9QTOAX0XVtJPd_IjQ5ITLicxCvfUnoEfGv5K8mogjaS6RrASnR7yxky2uapME0Q2X02nbAdAakAbmLyJtzp3KRQbZhF-tmFFfGnVL3uEycCUqXT0jQoK4gBu_uKi6kF5LHBj6qWn_d31FqJnqKpY3WlaLbcUnC-noJT3SnsVx-4GmBuyvOowGimU3d3XaqA-7ck_nu1aae) [ **STOP THE LEFT PETITION** ](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=4cdf95b5e6d04322b48ce64aa5fbb649&_e=9XCbm1UT7UxnFqvvy6OXr7EJMurud0-1O2yPhhAWK_9p9o4STUiT2hgNyjyVPxxdqf9JDqOCgv5mj1SgaHWa1YHQIg6ssaqTxL4icrNDhU8sSp5mvL2DrMVgIDKWD56lTe3hVb6fYCTxq42v4mGWjLRMGG62JYK00qE-4FRBydp7ojeLsrIPEs50UrJAioj-fuEMHg6yZt0KbBaRS_fqgCuLqxX_gB_TqZlO-FCGbp_hwhCgxgzEI49CMDRKwCi81wCWDl01UHDoG3hff_xjUSxATkhYiUkU1OjUuNba5krE62BHfxUVoLiMMXQ0cgpde35c07eiTrCuLykbfgchDm4slNx_8GS6PqMChgVwOwjRHcpouUV-z0zf-Q8CfbfBUAam1_q1ro2IpzYwmEMz-uhouZGErjVeQqi-jKHXyz_yRovK5OIoq-TnWleVgxs2) Peter, all politics aside, I wish you and your family a Christmas season filled with joy, and a healthy, prosperous new year.
Looking ahead to 2020, we have quite a bit of work to do, but I am confident that, with your support, we can do great things for the Lehigh Valley.
Merry Christmas and Happy New Year from all of us at Team Scheller! Thank you, Lisa Scheller

name: Karl Rove
subject: Quick – almost out of time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
We can't leave President Trump and his Senate Majority defenseless against the angry Left's vicious attacks. You must act NOW. This is the most important deadline of the year! Make an emergency 2x-matched donation before the FEC End of Year deadline >>>

Friend,

**URGENT:** **The FEC End of Year deadline is only 5 days away, and President Trump 's allies need YOUR help.**

Senate Republicans will have to publish their fundraising results at the end of this year, and Democrats will pour over the numbers looking for ANY sign of weakness. **It is vital they reach this important goal, but Republicans urgently need your help.** [**Chip in before midnight and your gift will be 2X MATCHED!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Ga-I0If-1VA9fGUJkYSXxs8NPntzCvSNuiiurOUCzjVHOxuQv2CM40Hu6m2WwEy8MqTN64nB04HFZDT516VIJMmPweuSZ0AKCTwGAsMficd5ExWVpIvsc16AfV11qb1Gc3QFX3DXp_dRHJLmoNDKtCfYOaKPwkCmHn8hl6KkD4TJZdfDij8j9Wj21ABBdetfrkZefvMcODhsSnaTnwKzCfmBWsjRsYsAtJAsQ87E25XfNJ6d8qyeDiJc7hcHmLpmLzcB9yQcbJQj45EyrYPFYnW9MZ5ZLoi5ekBjafQg7rHhj6fKJxqt0wF3ESQ2RDi-CouyHw-TA48o8g9Ss2F6Mz7wGwMZ52iP0klIi6bhhJw1t_U-tEGPGNA2-tgz3SFTDvVfLiuEfY=&c=tP6Sua6WL0Xn2qsOTCMMtevWAgadu8Yq3oPBT0JmnKeFtYxM232a5A==&ch=xThaylciD9lQVFI4vxL6JnE6h-2mZ9SsYbaUZIF_gcoppVvnM7PBbA==)

Democrats have broken fundraising records this year and hope to end this final month with a bang. subject: Happy Kwanzaa!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI SLOAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
We wish y’all a Happy Kwanzaa today, the first of six days of celebrating family, community, and culture. | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/7eb4edebd4f1/did-you-hear-about-heidis-arrest-3826865?e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | [ ](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=11eb676804bfa0f7eac2ca97a&id=3d6d6415f9&e=c169cb0a8e)
---
| | | ,
**We wish y’all a Happy Kwanzaa today, the first of six days of celebrating family, community, and culture.** From December 26th to the 31st, millions reflect on the Seven Principles of Kwanzaa: Umoja (Unity), Kujichagulia (Self-Determination), Ujima (Collective Work and Responsibility), Ujamaa (Cooperative Economics), Nia (Purpose), Kuumba (Creativity), and Imani (Faith).
---
| We stand in solidarity every day with our Black brothers and sisters for racial and economic justice. Together, we will win the good life for all of us, with all of us at the table.
Thank you for standing with us. We have your back.
In solidarity,

Team Heidi
---

name: Sara Gideon
subject: We have some ground to make up if we want to report a really great number after our FEC deadline next week, so I'm asking you to chip in $3 now to help us do it.
body:
I have to be honest.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e02/4bef7a87/6a3ae6f9/287f960d/884779739/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Good morning --
We have accomplished so much since we launched this campaign back in June.
We pushed our race from the "leans Republican" column to "toss-up." And we outraised Susan Collins last quarter without taking a dime of corporate PAC money.
But I have to be honest about something:
**Donations have really slowed down the past couple weeks as people turned their attention towards the holidays,** so Sara and I are worried we won't hit our fundraising goal this quarter and be able to report a really great number when our FEC goes public.
That's why I have to ask you now:
**[Can we count on you to make a $3 contribution before our FEC deadline on December 31st? All eyes will be on us when this report goes public, so now is such an important time to show your support.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e02/4bef7a87/6a3ae6f9/287f960c/884779739/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjYtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191226-1-b")**
This grassroots team has always stepped up for Sara when it counts. I trust you'll do the same today.
\- Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e02/4bef7a87/6a3ae6f9/287f960c/884779739/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjYtMS1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191226-1-b")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e02/4bef7a87/6a3ae6f9/287f9603/884779739/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e02/4bef7a87/6a3ae6f9/287f9602/884779739/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e02/4bef7a87/6a3ae6f9/287f9601/884779739/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Cory Booker
subject: Six days left. Six reasons to donate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| There are only six days left until the end of the year, so here are six reasons why I'm asking you to donate to our campaign today: Hey friend, There are only _six days left_ until the end of the year, so here are six reasons why I'm asking you to **[donate to our campaign today](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191226_CB_20191226-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer="):**
1. **The Iowa caucuses are just about a month away,** and we need to continue to build our team on the ground to have a strong showing on caucus night.
2. **We aired our first TV ad** in the early states and media markets across the country last week, but ads are expensive and we need to expand our reach.
3. **Our fourth-quarter fundraising numbers will go public** in January. We're on track to have our best quarter yet, but it's going to be close and we can't lose steam now.
4. **The DNC recently announced the threshold to qualify for the January debate,** and we're going to need to expand our ad budget to support our efforts to reach it.
5. **I don 't have billions in personal wealth **to fund this campaign. **We 're powered by people like you **\-- we don't accept contributions from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or fossil fuel or pharma execs.
6. **I 'm ready to defeat Donald Trump in 2020** and create lasting, far-reaching change in the Oval Office on Day One.

[**Friend, I hope it 's clear that there's no time like the present to make your first contribution to our campaign. Will you help us close out this month strong?**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191226_CB_20191226-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191226_CB_20191226-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c97/5fca0d19/7baf9cae/291cfa1a/425008912/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c97/5fca0d19/7baf9cae/291cfa19/425008912/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c97/5fca0d19/7baf9cae/291cfa18/425008912/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c97/5fca0d19/7baf9cae/291cfa67/425008912/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c97/5fca0d19/7baf9cae/291cfa66/425008912/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0c97/5fca0d19/7baf9cae/291cfa1a/425008912/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

name: [Holiday Update] via 314
subject: they said WHAT?!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| How did your holiday go?

Did any of your family members deny the existence of climate change?

Did someone ignore basic facts backed by hard-scientific evidence?

Did anyone say that they don't believe in climate change because there was a white Christmas?

If you heard any of these statements while you were unwrapping presents, you know how vital it is to support organizations like 314 who are working DAY and NIGHT to get scientific-minded Democrats elected at all levels of government.

[Give yourself a gift this holiday: help elect science-minded Democrats and anger your Republican relatives by donating to 314 today.](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Give+yourself+a+gift+this+holiday+help+e&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191226_1_1&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191226_1_1&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191226_1_1") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: This wasn't on my wish list, shopping list, or any kind of list
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Before the FEC deadline next week, we need to get our fundraising numbers as strong as possible. Soon after, we'll announce how much we've raised. Powerful special interests and other campaigns... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bd7f/45c30650/1171a894a/66fac818/4032605545/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Running for office wasn't on my bucket list, my wish list, my shopping list, or any kind of list. I never looked in the mirror as a kid and thought, _Hey, there 's a future president of the United States._

But I know why I'm in this fight. We're up against big problems. And we know that we need big, structural change to solve those problems (I've got plans for that).

But first, we need to keep growing our grassroots movement. That means getting organized -- person to person, face to face -- and making real investments in grassroots, on-the-ground community-building across the country. That's the only way to win in 2020. And it starts right _now_.

**Before the FEC deadline next week, we need to get our fundraising numbers as strong as possible.**

Soon after, we'll announce how much we've raised. Powerful special interests and other campaigns will size us up. So let's show them how strong we are. Let's show them that change is coming -- sooner than they think.

**I can 't thank you enough for everything you do as a member of this team. But I'll be honest: We're short of where we need to be right now, and we're counting on grassroots supporters to close the gap.

[Will you make your first contribution before the end of the year to help power our movement forward?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bd7f/45c30650/1171a894a/66fac81d/4032605545/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFIRl9FT1FfTEFVX0VfMjAxOTEyMjZfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1HF_EOQ_LAU_E_20191226_V1S1_P")** | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

name: Brad Parscale
subject: Help craft our 2020 strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
I’m showing this to the President soon. |
---
| | | | | | | | [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=74679605af0381f993c408ecad01caf6e6c9b1d01ff72aafdbd56e57e20648513219d369b7d4a761218258cb94a7ae99658aa3084dc41316)
---

Friend,

I've never seen anything like this.

Democrats are scraping the bottom of the barrel to come up with a game plan in an attempt to bolster their already-losing candidates. They're moving the goalposts daily to try and undermine President Trump.

Do you want to know how that's going for them? **They have no backbone, no leader, no message, and worst of all, NO respect for the Constitution.** President Trump's approval poll numbers are SKYROCKETING thanks to their Impeachment Charade.

But, that doesn't mean we can just sit around and wait for Election Day.

I'm meeting with President Trump at the end of the week to go over our 2020 Strategy, and he's asked that I get the input of a few trusted Republican leaders, like YOU, before I put together the final memo that he'll read.
**[Take our Official 2020 Strategy Survey NOW.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=74679605af0381f96052da6bae14addaaeef6b2deb095d41f1e83014d467d8c57cccaa016d5ec31b78f25514b5a484155a526a68b7ac3573)**
The data we're collecting is crucial to our success in 2020. It will help us decide which states we need to deploy volunteers to, where we should be targeting our efforts, and what we can do to show the rest of the country that we need another four years of President Trump.

Instead of asking 84 MILLION registered Republicans across the Nation, I'm only asking a select group of the President's BEST SUPPORTERS in each county to take our **Official 2020 Strategy Survey.**
---
|
_Your answers will represent the views of EVERY Republican who lives in your area._

**[Please take our Official 2020 Strategy Survey NOW to tell President Trump what you think.>>](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=74679605af0381f966d869f8ebf2c1d501a8e4ca262e80836664ae9aa47f3d17230c3a0e064a138ea3d8201fb308c4a2bf481071f4f5f208)**

**REGISTRATION NUMBER:** 6124335 - 2019
**DEADLINE:****11:59 PM TONIGHT** ************************************[** Do you believe Trump Rallies are effective?

O YES

O NO**](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=74679605af0381f9d63c8b6cdbe69b1008d294b0a6f64a5022ed7c8cf66801e05220a6655ffcee2877a775517e8539ae120f1b5d59f7e5e5)************************************ ********[ TAKE THE SURVEY NOW](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f8232eba36ac6829fc497a7764afef6e53cc9c5cf500bd80e0e9eff4174e95cb282ab10bca4bab2f2ba74cdd9b059721e888779767bff794)******** _Attention: Please take the survey by 11:59 PM TONIGHT to be sure your answers are shared: _ _**[https://action.donaldjtrump.com/2020-starting-now](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f8232eba36ac68290794de4ac3ed1e3cede8055c3b4d45e6b8f99dd84301492a21ab2a237accbae9d18bce2a02cb4db801e090d2006e40a0)**_
The truth is, thanks to Nancy's Impeachment Scam, our approval poll numbers are only going UP. This Witch Hunt is showing the American People the Democrats' true colors and exposing them for the FRAUDS that they really are.

I know President Trump will WIN BIG at the ballot box in November, but I want to make sure we're ready to face whatever the corrupt Democrats throw at us.

_That 's why your input is so critical._ Next time I meet with President Trump, I want to show him what YOU think.

**[Take our Official 2020 Strategy Survey before 11:59 PM TONIGHT to have one of the first responses President Trump sees.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=f8232eba36ac68299901221a797f7eb1173b98d4accf727fbc9c2b86aab63e09d4752ba13b5c7c7e85774f5a6f5c9f36eac20c7970e31576)**
Thank you,

clean_body: I’m showing this to the President soon. | | | | | | | | | Friend, I've never seen anything like this. Democrats are scraping the bottom of the barrel to come up with a game plan in an attempt to bolster their already-losing candidates. They're moving the goalposts daily to try and undermine President Trump. Do you want to know how that's going for them? They have no backbone, no leader, no message, and worst of all, NO respect for the Constitution. President Trump's approval poll numbers are SKYROCKETING thanks to their Impeachment Charade. But, that doesn't mean we can just sit around and wait for Election Day. I'm meeting with President Trump at the end of the week to go over our 2020 Strategy, and he's asked that I get the input of a few trusted Republican leaders, like YOU, before I put together the final memo that he'll read. The data we're collecting is crucial to our success in 2020. It will help us decide which states we need to deploy volunteers to, where we should be targeting our efforts, and what we can do to show the rest of the country that we need another four years of President Trump. Instead of asking 84 MILLION registered Republicans across the Nation, I'm only asking a select group of the President's BEST SUPPORTERS in each county to take our Official 2020 Strategy Survey. | Your answers will represent the views of EVERY Republican who lives in your area. This Witch Hunt is showing the American People the Democrats' true colors and exposing them for the FRAUDS that they really are. I know President Trump will WIN BIG at the ballot box in November, but I want to make sure we're ready to face whatever the corrupt Democrats throw at us. That 's why your input is so critical. Next time I meet with President Trump, I want to show him what YOU think. Thank you, Brad Parscale Campaign Manager Donald J. name: Andrew Yang
subject: Now or never, Yang Gang
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
This is an official FEC deadline and whatever we raise this quarter will go public for everyone to see.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn) Yang Gang --

There are no do-overs. There is no extension. This is an official FEC deadline and whatever we raise this quarter will go public for everyone to see.

**[I’m counting on you, Yang Gang, in this moment, to give it all you can before the clock runs out at 11:59 PM ET on December 31st. Will you make your first contribution of $10 today toward our $3 million goal?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20470?t=5&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20470?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20470?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20470?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20470?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20470?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20470?t=11&amount=25&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn)
---
We are doing something unique here. Our people-powered campaign is taking on the biggest issues of our time.

Because each of us knows that the challenges of the country are great, but if we work together we can solve them.

We can create a country of prosperity -- not scarcity.

We can lower costs, provide healthcare to all, and start a conversation on healthcare that’s people-centered and not just political rhetoric.

And we can build an economy that puts Humanity First -- not corporate profits.

**[We’re in this fight together. That’s why I’m asking you to make your first contribution of $10 or more now. We can only win with everyone coming together. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20470?t=12&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn)**

I’m proud to be building this movement with you,

-Andrew
**We don't have corporate PACs or big donors who can close the fundraising gap we face, just grassroots donors like you powering this campaign. Please give now.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20470?t=13&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5146%2E377263%2EqHgMCn) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: How to stop voter apathy from costing us the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23%, and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. But if Democrats fail to show up to vote in 2020, Trump will win again, we'll lose our House majority, and Mitch McConnell will maintain control of the Senate. If Trump wins re-election after surviving impeachment, he'll grow increasingly unhinged. Kids in cages, the Muslim Ban, tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations, withdrawal from the Paris climate accords, calling white supremacists "very fine people," and calling his impeachment a "lynching." That all will look tame. Trump will stack the Supreme Court with more lifetime appointments, more justices like Brett Kavanaugh. Trump will gut the EPA. He'll destroy Obamacare and defund Medicare and Social Security in favor of more and more tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations. Our mission at When Democrats Turn Out is to prevent a repeat of the 2016 election by educating voters in key swing states. Our mission is to support every single key Senate battleground race and dozens of House candidates. Our mission is to beat Trump in 2020. But right now, we're falling VERY short of our fundraising goals. If we can't raise another $2,100 today, we'll need to significantly scale back our strategy in 2020. We do not accept corporate contributions or contributions from Big Oil, Big Banks, or Big Pharma. Our work is 100% funded by thousands of grassroots supporters across the country. Our work is funded by you. [**Peter , if you care about stopping Trump, electing a Democrat to the White House in 2020, and removing Mitch McConnell from power, then please, we're asking you to please donate $5 or more immediately to support our work turning out voters, stopping GOP voter suppression, taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell, and getting Trump out of the White House. Can you give just $5 now?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf1b/6e9863e8/177ad029/1db04a6b/1060658904/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191226a.ND&refcode2=FZ5SRdDvHXGMUJR4GsCR") Your help is critical to pushing back and winning in 2020. Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf1b/6e9863e8/177ad029/1db04a6b/1060658904/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191226a.ND&refcode2=FZ5SRdDvHXGMUJR4GsCR")

clean_body: | = Hey Team, I’m Michael and I’m the Finance Director here on the Winter campaign. I wanted to tell you a little bit more about why the end of quarter deadline is so important. After December 31st our finance numbers go public. Political eyes across the country will watch these numbers and judge the strength of our campaign. The more money we have, the more seriously people will take our campaign. = | | = We wish that politics didn’t revolve so much around finances - but until we pass campaign finance reform we have to work this way. We can’t forget - this seat is wide open \- it’s anyone’s for the taking. Let’s show the pundits that this grassroots campaign means business. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: ** | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for pitching in! Friend, when I look back on this year, I’m overwhelmed with gratitude.
We built this campaign from the ground up. When we started, we didn’t have any big-name endorsements, a famous last name, or a million dollars in the bank to fall back on.
**But we did have a story.** So many of you graciously listened to the story of my family — growing up in New York’s 17th raised by a single mom, getting by with the help of section 8 housing and food stamps, fighting every day for our piece of the American Dream.
Seeing how my story resonated with so many of you was a powerful reminder that my story isn’t unique at all. Millions of families are still struggling to reach the same goals and aspirations of my family — and that’s why I’m humbled to be back in the district I grew up in, running for Congress to fight for all families to have a piece of the American Dream.
**[So before the year ends, can I ask you to donate today and become a Founding Donor to our grassroots campaign? body:
| |

| Team -

I'm reaching out to you to ask you to make your first donation today. [You can chip in right here >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba89b/134673f2/97e7159/699790ed/1591621984/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

I want to take a moment to tell you why any amount you donate is so important.

We've planted our flag in New Hampshire where an unprecedented 67% of primary voters are undecided or open to changing their minds.

[That's why we're planning to launch an aggressive paid media and organizing program to get our message out to every voter. To do that, we must raise $700,000, and we can't do it without grassroots supporters like you.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba89b/134673f2/97e7159/699790ed/1591621984/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_122619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[So far we've raised $157,216. We've made good progress, but we have a long way to go, so that's why I'm asking, Kara. Will you step up now and rush a donation today? | Team -

I'm reaching out to you to ask you to make your first donation today. clean_body: = Peter, = We just wanted to make sure y’all didn’t miss this HUGE announcement Politico published about our district - they declared TX-02 is no longer a safely red seat. = **= Thanks for being a part of this fight, Team Cardnell \---------Forwarded Message---------- From: Cardnell HQ <mailto:info@elisacardnell.com> Date: Thursday, Nov 21 Subject: ⚠️ Breaking News - Politico just announced TX-02 is no longer safely red ⚠️ To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Peter -- Have you heard the news? Over the years our district has been shifting more purple, and yesterday Politico called us “Lean R,” after being “Safe R” for years. = = This is huge news for us - Dan Crenshaw is not as safe as he thinks - because soon TX-02 will have real representation!** Politico is recognizing what we have been seeing since 2016 - Texans are sick and tired of back room deals, dark money, and wealthy donors controlling the way we are represented. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Let's flip Texas blue! Peter — I'm sickened by Republican Leader Kevin McCarthy’s antics.

[**Right before the holidays, McCarthy went on FOX News and accused our FBI of spying on Trump and trying to cover it up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13268618/137588132/10128690?refcode=20191226-EM-E1-DF-T0F1S1C1-AC&amount=25&recurring=1&refcode2=a2af87b0-2f28-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODI4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmFmODdiMC0yZjI4LWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EXP4ddnGUlvqCpByr2OPIpOVukAs6LIeu8xa8_-HoUk=)

It’s shocking and sad that McCarthy is so desperate for power that he will LIE to keep it.

The working families of this district deserve so much better than to have the BIGGEST Trump defender in the House representing them. That’s why I’m running for Congress.

We are just 5 days until this key deadline and I need your help.** We are up against a lot. I am running to unseat an entrenched incumbent who is more interested in his donors than his constituents. Michael McCaul has been in office for over a decade and has done nothing but work for his high-dollar backers and corporate allies. We need someone in Congress who will work to bring green jobs, universal healthcare, and real representation to the Texas 10th. I have been fighting for the people my whole career. From teaching in public school classrooms to working as an attorney for the City of Austin, I have always been working to better the lives of the people in our communities. **[I am running to continue my fight for the people. When I ran for this seat last election, no one gave us a chance. People had written this district off as a "solid-red" district where a Democrat didn’t have a chance. Well, we did what hadn’t been done. We ran a people-powered campaign that harnessed the amazing grassroots enthusiasm that existed in this district. Our campaign hit the streets and worked hard, knocking on doors and talking to voters where they were. That work turned this district into a national battleground. clean_body: Peter, I hope everyone is having a great holiday season. While we are enjoying our family holidays, I am also excited to get back to work finishing this quarter strong. We are just 5 days until this key deadline and I need your help. We are up against a lot. I am running to unseat an entrenched incumbent who is more interested in his donors than his constituents. Michael McCaul has been in office for over a decade and has done nothing but work for his high-dollar backers and corporate allies. We need someone in Congress who will work to bring green jobs, universal healthcare, and real representation to the Texas 10th. I have been fighting for the people my whole career. From teaching in public school classrooms to working as an attorney for the City of Austin, I have always been working to better the lives of the people in our communities. = = = = = = When I ran for this seat last election, no one gave us a chance. People had written this district off as a "solid-red" district where a Democrat didn’t have a chance. Well, we did what hadn’t been done. We ran a people-powered campaign that harnessed the amazing grassroots enthusiasm that existed in this district. Our campaign hit the streets and worked hard, knocking on doors and talking to voters where they were. That work turned this district into a national battleground. Now, we are going to finish the job and bring the Texas 10th the representation that it deserves. = Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

Mitch McConnell's lead in the polls PLUNGED to just one point. With one final Democratic surge, we can OVERTAKE McConnell and start the new year off with a HUGE burst of Democratic momentum. [**TAKE THE POLL: Do you approve of McConnell 's cruel and disastrous Senate leadership?**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c69/3177865371/VEsE/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191226_em_pet_b1_mapv_all") [**NO!! >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c69/3177865371/VEsF/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191226_em_pet_b1_mapv_all")** **[Yes](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c69/3177865371/VEsC/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191226_em_pet_b1_mapv_all")****
---

This has been one of the worst years of Mitch McConnell's entire career.

And the polls prove it: Democrats are now just ONE point shy of overtaking him.

With one final Democratic surge before the year ends, we can overtake McConnell once and for all.

**Let 's make sure the first thing McConnell sees in 2020 is him LOSING to Democrats. **

[_**10,000 ANTI-MCCONNELL RESPONSES NEEDED: Before the year ends, take the final McConnell Approval Poll to prove we want him OUT of office and OUT of the Senate. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c69/3177865371/VEsD/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/mcconnell-approval-survey?source=20191226_em_pet_b1_mapv_all")

Thank you,

Team Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c6e/3177865371/VEsA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c6f/3177865371/VEsB/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c6c/3177865371/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c6d/3177865371/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c62/3177865371/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b77b/18e32a7f/508fbf55/7b228c63/3177865371/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc960/3eb3e2fc/69a09533/744ec993/3231114580/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191226_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191226_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. name: Matt Klapper, Cory 2020
subject: Have you ever tried to tell Cory he can't do something?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
Spoiler: It's not something he's going to accept.
| | |
---
| | **_We 're $333,059 away from our December goal.
Chip in today.

[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191226_MK_20191226-fr-MK-underdog-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")_**
---

OK, let's face facts, everybody.
We weren't on last week's debate stage. We're not leading in the polls. And, oh yeah, there are billionaires spending tens of millions of dollars on TV to persuade voters.
The odds aren't exactly stacked in our favor.
**But there 's a reason you don't see anyone on this team panicking: We know our boss.**
Just try and tell him something can't be done, and you'll see him roll up his sleeves and get to work to prove you wrong. He's been doing it his whole life.
That is the Cory Booker who shows up every day. He's determined to prove the cynics wrong and show the world what we can accomplish when we join together in common cause. **And it 's paying off.**
The daily reports from our Iowa team paint a different picture than you're seeing in the horse race polls. Speaking of polls, we're seeing upward movement. And our grassroots fundraising is stronger than it's ever been.
We're underdogs, and we're proud of it. But we also know the only way we win is if we keep this momentum up. We set an ambitious fundraising goal for the end of this month, and we have $333,059 to go to hit it.
_**[Will you chip in right now and help finish December with the push we need to start 2020 strong?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191226_MK_20191226-fr-MK-underdog-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
Thanks,
Klapper
Matt Klapper
Senior Advisor
Cory 2020
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191226_MK_20191226-fr-MK-underdog-actives_actives_contribbutton2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| All too often, we spend the holidays with family members who we don't agree with. A difference of opinion is one thing, but when family members start to deny the basic facts that are backed by hard-scientific evidence, that's different. You might not be able to change your relatives' minds in just the few days they're in town.

[But you can channel your anger into something productive. name: Sara 2020
subject: Donald Trump tweeted that he supports Susan Collins.
body:
He's 100% behind her.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e04/4bef7a87/6a3e03e2/287f97b9/3559742509/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Did you see this? -- Donald Trump recently tweeted and he's now RAISING MONEY for Susan Collins.
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e04/4bef7a87/6a3e03e2/287f97b8/3559742509/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjYtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191226-1-full")
Sara Gideon is not only taking on Susan Collins in this race, she is taking on Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, Lindsey Graham and virtually the entire Republican Party establishment.
So she needs your help, right now, because no one person can take them on alone:
**[Rush a $3 contribution to Sara Gideon's people-powered campaign before our FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close. Help us fight back against Donald Trump's efforts to help Susan Collins.](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e04/4bef7a87/6a3e03e2/287f97b8/3559742509/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMjYtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec?refcode=em191226-1-full")**
Sara Gideon is refusing to take corporate PAC money in this race, so she really needs our help -- because this race could literally determine control of the Senate.
All our best,
Team Sara

name: Max Glass
subject: Our first real test of our grassroots strength
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Barbara Bollier for U
body:
In just 5 days, we’ll have to lay our cards on the table and report exactly what we have raised since we launched this campaign in October. You can | | | [](http://links.bollierforkansas.com/u/click?_t=9b0f889d9ec84544b5cf693bbcca79a1&_m=5324bbb45ead4f97829eadd537d6ec9b&_e=2UjKTLC45U9Rl2-M6_JsRPlPk2usD47ohiIarTU-wV0aYZSpCwcd45WdnYkkGg_3_qR4Uda5MrDhXGrR8CPEr9wjhhmtWIXOrNh5iYRgk06sM7juZ1DsTJoBcGq6kM2le9D1Ki8Bzp9i1qfhVd0-E3KfHhutGSEOz1ITqO7EEroy4ZclXG1nQFds7sYuQOtfxddDc_CSBMASk_ltF5uZifgM4xzT__jM4zlZ-u_chUSZrI7Eyd9jtAbl1gYQAd3DQQgEeqH_wChJQewGqvE2rG7MBWf44BFYG9-ACroKWrM7jVLFFpc_9NldBfZqJCg88Q8OyynZjtA1VrAvNoDEvqPbM2ls852JM61XwZndYGcGxtcy6j_12_MpkPnQZ5j5qUq2-WGRNjdyKPdwvBx9Ib0varDD6ekU_yfieEMP1svswaLdYN8Ljz5pVZOFi85mu8fUgdt1oZFzhR6Ch1g4_w%3D%3D) Hey there -- I know we’ve been emailing a lot lately, but I wouldn’t reach out if it weren’t important. In just 5 days, we’ll have to lay our cards on the table and report exactly what we have raised since we launched this campaign in October. You can bet Kris Kobach and Mitch McConnell are watching. We need to prove we have the resources and momentum behind us to ensure a win next year. [**That’s why we need to raise another $20,000 by midnight on December 31st. name: Bennet 2020
subject: This race is wide open
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| |
---
| Team -

Some pundits will try to tell you that primary voters have made up their minds and that this race is over.

That couldn't be further from the truth.

[An unprecedented number of New Hampshire primary voters - 67% - are undecided or open to changing their mind.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba895/134673f2/9733b9d/69979025/2951622203/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_122619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

That's why we announced our goal to raise $700,000 in order to launch an aggressive paid media and organizing program in New Hampshire to get Michael's message out to every voter.

[It's absolutely critical that we hit our goal to reach all those undecided voters. We've managed to raise $161,771 so far but we need your help. Will you make your first donation right away?](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba895/134673f2/9733b9d/69979025/2951622203/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_122619_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Team Warren
subject: falling behind our benchmarks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
We're going into every community to reach every voter, and we're knocking on doors, making phone calls, and training volunteers in all 50 states and Puerto Rico. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bead/45c30650/114eb41f0/66faea8f/2060316587/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
This campaign runs on the principle of equal access -- meaning no one is left behind.

We're going into every community to reach every voter, and we're knocking on doors, making phone calls, and training volunteers in all 50 states and Puerto Rico.

**But a 50-state organizing operation takes serious resources, and right now, we're falling behind our benchmarks. So we need a strong response from emails like this one to turn things around.**

It's absolutely crucial that we build up the resources we need to continue the fight in Iowa and beyond. And anything you chip in, whether it's $1, $2, or $5, will go a long way towards keeping up the momentum as we move into 2020.

[**Will you chip in for the first time to help hit our fundraising goals before the FEC deadline? When you do, we'll send you a FREE sticker as a thank you!**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bead/45c30650/114eb41f0/66faea8e/2060316587/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlci1lb3EiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFJRl9FT1FfR1JNX1RfMjAxOTEyMjZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker-eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1IF_EOQ_GRM_T_20191226_V1S2_P") [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bead/45c30650/114eb41f0/66faea8e/2060316587/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlci1lb3EiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFJRl9FT1FfR1JNX1RfMjAxOTEyMjZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker-eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1IF_EOQ_GRM_T_20191226_V1S2_P") | _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

>
Here's what we know: when people learn about Elizabeth's plans for big, structural change -- and how those plans impact their lives and communities -- they join the fight, and they're all in for Elizabeth.

That's how we're going to win -- by talking to as many people and reaching as many communities as possible. But this is a team effort, and your support is crucial to our movement's success.

**Big, structural change isn't easy. It's going to take a real grassroots movement to fight for it, and we need your help to make it happen. So we're sending everyone who decides to join this movement today a FREE sticker to say thank you for your hard work.**

[**If you can, chip in $2 or whatever you can today to fight with Elizabeth -- and help our campaign hit our fundraising goals before the final FEC deadline of the year.**](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bead/45c30650/114eb41f0/66faea8e/2060316587/VEsEDQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnItc3RpY2tlci1lb3EiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTFJRl9FT1FfR1JNX1RfMjAxOTEyMjZfVjFTMl9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr-sticker-eoq?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM1IF_EOQ_GRM_T_20191226_V1S2_P")

Team Warren

clean_body: We're going into every community to reach every voter, and we're knocking on doors, making phone calls, and training volunteers in all 50 states and Puerto Rico. | | | "" This campaign runs on the principle of equal access -- meaning no one is left behind. We're going into every community to reach every voter, and we're knocking on doors, making phone calls, and training volunteers in all 50 states and Puerto Rico. But a 50-state organizing operation takes serious resources, and right now, we're falling behind our benchmarks. So we need a strong response from emails like this one to turn things around. It's absolutely crucial that we build up the resources we need to continue the fight in Iowa and beyond. And anything you chip in, whether it's $1, $2, or $5, will go a long way towards keeping up the momentum as we move into 2020. name: Team Wendy
subject: Missing your name on this card
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
We know Wendy would love to hear from you.
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-just_married?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk42-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-2020-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk42-su-nd")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-just_married?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk42-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-2020-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk42-su-nd")
Have you heard the big news, friend?! Wendy just recently got married!
We're putting together a congratulations card for Wendy and her husband, Alan. But before we seal it up, we want to fill it with signatures and well wishes from Wendy's grassroots team - people like you, friend. It would really mean a lot to the happy couple. **[Will you add your name to the card right now?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-just_married?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk42-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-2020-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk42-su-nd")**
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-just_married?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk42-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-2020-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk42-su-nd")
In a long, tough campaign like this one, it's important to stop and celebrate life's joyful moments when they come around - to reflect and recharge for the fight ahead. Before the year's up, we know Wendy and Alan would love to see how this team was part of their celebration.
**We 're still missing your signature, but it will only take two seconds:** **[Sign the card now and congratulate Wendy and Alan on getting married!](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/wendy-davis-just_married?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk42-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwendy-davis-2020-survey%3Fcode%3Djtk42-su-nd")**
Thanks,
Team Wendy

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a9d/704929dc/1602c37c/39939871/1684090366/VEsA/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a9d/704929dc/1602c37c/39939870/1684090366/VEsB/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").
[To unsubscribe from the Wendy Davis for Congress email list, please click here.](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a9d/704929dc/1602c37c/39939873/1684090366/VEsO/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe")
Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress

After the Democratic National Committee released its 225,000 individual donor requirement for the January debate, we did some math -- and we came up with this number for Pennsylvania: 744. Donor requirement: 225,000 by January 10 Donors needed in Pennsylvania: 744 If just 744 people in Pennsylvania step up in the last few days of 2019 to invest in Tom’s campaign, we’ll be in good shape. Can you join us with a $1 contribution today? No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc961/3eb3e2fc/69a58410/744ec8d1/336753757/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=12+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191226_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191226_em_fr_b2_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc961/3eb3e2fc/69a58410/744ec8d0/336753757/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+here&utm_campaign=20191226_em_fr_b2_castro_all&source=20191226_em_fr_b2_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: First things first
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell intend to buy this election. It's on each and every one of us to stop them.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191226-first?refcode=em191226-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") **First** , Donald Trump lost Minnesota by just 1.5 percentage points in 2016.

**Then** , Minnesota became one of Trump's top targets in 2020. He can't afford to let us slip through his fingers again.

**Now** , Trump pledged to come back to our state and even endorsed our GOP opponent, Jason Lewis.

**But** , we have what it takes to keep Minnesota blue, save this Senate seat, and make sure Donald Trump loses in 2020.

**So, we're asking as many supporters (like you!) as possible to step up for our campaign before the final FEC deadline of the year. Add a contribution of $10 or more to support Tina's re-election campaign and help us bring Democrats one step closer to the majority in Washington.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191226-first?refcode=em191226-first&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

The truth is, we really hit the ground running and started strong in this race -- but that means we cannot afford to slow down now. Trump, McConnell, and Lewis intend to buy this election. It's on each and every one of us to stop them.

Thanks for stepping up today.

-- Team Tina
